| 2026 | [Are Sparse Autoencoder Benchmarks Reliable?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18229) <br><sub>`chanin-2026-sae-benchmark-reliability`</sub> | paper<br><sub>preprint</sub> | `sparse-autoencoders`<br>`interpretability-evaluation`<br>`robustness` | `screened` | [pdf](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.18229) | Audits SAEBench metrics for reseed noise ground-truth correlation and discriminability and finds major reliability problems. |
